rows.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'This fixture is a locked benchmark workspace.' in text"

rows.verifier: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; report = json.loads(next(Path('.pico/runs').glob('*/report.json')).read_text(encoding='utf-8')); trace = [json.loads(line) for line in next(Path('.pico/runs').glob('*/trace.jsonl')).read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()]; assert report['checkpoint_id']; assert any(event.get('event') == 'checkpoint_created' and event.get('trigger') == 'context_reduction' for event in trace)"
